raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Coastal Conservancy announced that TOGETHER Bay Area would receive $1,100,000 in grant funding.",
    "The funding will increase the pace and scale of conservation efforts in the Bay Area.",
    "The funding aims to address climate challenges and increase the region’s capacity for biodiversity-supporting projects.",
    "The Conservation Lands Network serves as an organizing tool for regional coordination in biodiversity conservation.",
    "The Conservation Lands Network includes geography-specific habitat goals for biodiversity conservation.",
    "The Conservation Lands Network consists of maps and tools used by practitioners and funders to achieve habitat goals.",
```
